; ── InventoryOS PgBouncer userlist ──
; Format:  "username" "password"
;
; With auth_type=trust (see pgbouncer.ini) passwords are NOT verified — PgBouncer
; only checks that the username exists in this file. The container is on a private
; Docker network and the host port is bound to 127.0.0.1, so this is safe.
;
; If you later switch to auth_type=md5 (recommended for multi-host deploys),
; replace the placeholders below with MD5 hashes generated by:
;
;     echo -n "passwordpassword" | md5sum
;     # then format as:  "md5<hash>"
;     # e.g.             "inventoryos" "md5d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e"
;
; (the md5 is computed over `password + username` — see PgBouncer docs:
;  https://www.pgbouncer.org/config.html#authentication-file-types)

"inventoryos" "inventoryos"
"postgres" "postgres"
